email_subject: Application for Customer Service Medewerker – SAP Key User
email_body:
Dear Ann Persegael,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Medewerker – SAP Key User position at Actief Interim Turnhout. With a strong foundation in customer service, order processing, and ERP systems, I am confident I can contribute effectively to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client websites and optimize processes using tools like WordPress and analytics platforms. My experience includes handling data, tracking performance, and collaborating across teams to ensure smooth operations. Previously, I worked in warehouse logistics at Katoen Natie, where I maintained accuracy in a fast-paced environment, and as a Front-End Developer at ViviDoctor, where I developed features for a healthcare application.

I am detail-oriented, process-driven, and eager to learn SAP and EDI systems. I am based in Zwijndrecht and available to start immediately. I look forward to discussing how my skills align with your needs.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Ann Persegael,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service Medewerker – SAP Key User position at Actief Interim Turnhout. With a background in digital marketing, web development, and logistics, I bring a unique blend of technical aptitude, process orientation, and customer focus that aligns well with this role.

In my current position as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client websites end-to-end, from keyword research and content publishing to performance tracking using tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush. This experience has honed my ability to handle data, follow structured processes, and communicate effectively with stakeholders. I am comfortable working with CMS platforms and have a strong affinity for technology, which I believe will translate well to learning SAP and EDI systems.

Previously, I worked as a Front-End Developer at ViviDoctor, where I built and optimized features for a healthcare web application using AngularJS and JavaScript. This role taught me the importance of precision, testing, and collaboration with cross-functional teams. Additionally, my time in warehouse logistics at Katoen Natie gave me firsthand experience in high-volume order processing and inventory management, reinforcing my attention to detail and ability to work under pressure.

I am particularly drawn to this role because it combines customer service with system optimization. I enjoy improving workflows and am eager to contribute to SAP projects and process improvements. I am based in Zwijndrecht, available to start immediately, and currently improving my Dutch (A2 level).

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills can benefit your team.

Warm regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Experience with order processing and logistics in a high-volume environment (Katoen Natie)
Technical aptitude with ERP-like systems (WordPress, analytics tools) and eagerness to learn SAP
Process-oriented mindset: managed full-cycle website builds, content workflows, and performance tracking
Strong data management and reporting skills using Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
Customer-focused communication and cross-team collaboration from digital marketing and development roles
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with a technical foundation in web development, digital marketing, and logistics. Experienced in order processing, data management, and process optimization. Strong affinity with ERP systems and eager to develop expertise in SAP and EDI. Comfortable working cross-functionally, handling customer-facing tasks, and improving workflows. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Order processing & logistics: high-volume order handling, inventory management, accuracy in fast-paced environments
- Data management & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Process optimization: technical SEO audits, structured data implementation, workflow improvements
- Customer service: client communication, cross-team collaboration, complaint handling
- Technical systems: WordPress, Elementor, AngularJS, JavaScript, CMS platforms
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
